context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses the existing docs/adr/ directory, assigns the next sequential number (0003), matches existing filename conventions, and properly updates the existing README index.

checklist.name: Uses existing ADR directory
checklist.description: The new ADR file is placed in docs/adr/ (the existing directory), not docs/adrs/ or any other path

checklist.name: Correct sequential number
checklist.description: The new ADR is numbered 0003 (highest existing is 0002, so next is 0003)

checklist.name: Status is Accepted
checklist.description: The Status field is 'Accepted' (the decision is final)

checklist.name: Date not hardcoded
checklist.description: The Date field contains a real ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) obtained via shell command, not guessed

checklist.name: Required sections present
checklist.description: The ADR contains all four required sections: Context and drivers, Considered options, Decision, Consequences

checklist.name: At least two options
checklist.description: The Considered options section lists at least two options (e.g. URL path versioning, header-based versioning)

checklist.name: README row appended
checklist.description: The existing README.md in docs/adr/ has a new row added for the 0003 ADR, linking its number to the file

checklist.name: Existing README rows preserved
checklist.description: The README.md still contains the original rows for 0001 and 0002 (nothing was deleted or overwritten)
